TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == olit == kwohe ga sinu ana nni'un na cyolu uy. olit ga, mita' ngyaw lga, mutu kinsuruw mgyay la. olit na ksumuk hiya' ga, blaq nya' maki' talap ngasal. cipuq cikay hi' nya' ru blaq nya' balay qmihuy slaq ru hriqun nya' kwara' pinuya'.
S.PHON: == olit == kwońße …£a s~…ēinu ana nni Ēun na ¶~ ®jolu uj. olit …£a, mita Ē Ňčjaw l…£a, mutu kins~…ēuruw m…£jaj la. olit na ks~…ēumuk ńßija Ē …£a, ő≤laq nja Ē maki Ē talap Ňčas~…ēal. ¶~ ®ipuq ¶~ ®ikaj ńßi Ē nja Ē ru ő≤laq nja Ē ő≤alaj qmińßuj s~…ēlaq ru ńßriqun nja Ē kwara Ē pinuja Ē.
S.FORM: == olit == kwohe ga sinu ana nni'un na cyolu uy. olit ga, mita' ngyaw lga, mutu kinsuruw mgyay la. olit na ksumuk hiya' ga, blaq nya' maki' talap ngasal. cipuq cikay hi' nya' ru blaq nya' balay qmihuy slaq ru hriqun nya' kwara' pinuya'.
S.PHON: == olit == kwońße …£a s~…ēinu ana nni Ēun na ¶~ ®jolu uj. olit …£a, mita Ē Ňčjaw l…£a, mutu kins~…ēuruw m…£jaj la. olit na ks~…ēumuk ńßija Ē …£a, ő≤laq nja Ē maki Ē talap Ňčas~…ēal. ¶~ ®ipuq ¶~ ®ikaj ńßi Ē nja Ē ru ő≤laq nja Ē ő≤alaj qmińßuj s~…ēlaq ru ńßriqun nja Ē kwara Ē pinuja Ē.
